11	## Houdini Agent
12	
13	[# Houdini AI时代已来（Agent开源）](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1pwcbzBEEh/?spm_id_from=333.1387.favlist.content.click&vd_source=089349bc15fe4a0508fc235b6d5563a8)
14	
15	**[English](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/blob/main/README.md)** | **[中文](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/blob/main/README_CN.md)**
16	
17	A standalone AI assistant for SideFX Houdini, featuring autonomous multi-turn tool calling, **Meshy AI 3D generation** (text/image→3D, concept galleries, image-to-image editing, retexture, remesh), a **cloud asset library**, web search, VEX/Python code execution, Plan mode for complex tasks, a brain-inspired long-term memory system, a plugin hook system for community extensions, user-defined context rules, and a modern **QML/Qt Quick** desktop UI with bilingual support.
18	
19	As of **v2.0**, Houdini Agent runs as a **standalone desktop app** that connects to a running Houdini over a lightweight **bridge** (no longer embedded in the Houdini process), with a completely rewritten **QML/Qt Quick** front-end (Mono Editorial design).
20	
21	Built on the **OpenAI Function Calling** protocol, the agent can read node networks, create/modify/connect nodes, run VEX wrangles, generate and import 3D assets via Meshy, execute system shell commands, search the web, query local documentation, create structured execution plans, learn from past interactions, and be extended via plugins — all within an iterative agent loop. A centralized **ToolRegistry** unifies core tools, skills, and plugin tools with mode-based access control.
22	
23	## Core Features
24	
25	### Agent Loop
26	
27	The AI operates in an autonomous **agent loop**: it receives a user request, plans the steps, calls tools, inspects results, and iterates until the task is complete. Three modes are available:
28	
29	- **Agent mode** — Full access to all 50+ tools. The AI can create, modify, connect, and delete nodes, set parameters, execute scripts, generate and import 3D assets, and save the scene.
30	- **Ask mode** — Read-only. The AI can only query scene structure, inspect parameters, search documentation, and provide analysis. All mutating tools are blocked by a `ToolRegistry` mode guard.
31	- **Plan mode** — The AI enters a planning phase: it researches the current scene (read-only), clarifies requirements via `ask_question`, then generates a structured execution plan with DAG flow diagram. The user reviews and confirms before execution begins. An **auto-resume mechanism** detects premature AI termination and forces continuation until all steps are complete.
32	
33	```
34	User request → AI plans → call tools → inspect results → call more tools → … → final reply
35	```
36	
37	- **Multi-turn tool calling** — the AI decides which tools to call and in what order
38	- **Todo task system** — complex tasks are broken into tracked subtasks with live status updates
39	- **Streaming output** — real-time display of thinking process and responses
40	- **Extended Thinking** — native support for reasoning models (DeepSeek-R1, GLM-4.7, Claude with `<think>` tags)
41	- **Stop anytime** — interrupt the running agent loop at any point
42	- **Smart context management** — round-based conversation trimming that never truncates user/assistant messages, only compresses tool results
43	- **Long-term memory** — brain-inspired three-layer memory system (episodic, semantic, procedural) with reward-driven learning and automatic reflection
44	- **Plugin system** — external community extensions via `plugins/` directory with hook events, custom tools, UI buttons, and settings
45	- **User Rules** — Cursor-style persistent context rules that are automatically injected into every AI request
46

58	### Vision / Image Input
59	
60	- **Multimodal messages** — attach images (PNG/JPG/GIF/WebP) to your messages for vision-capable models
61	- **Paste & drag-drop** — `Ctrl+V` paste from clipboard, drag image files into the chat input
62	- **File picker** — click the "Img" button to select images from disk
63	- **Image preview** — thumbnails displayed above the input box before sending, with remove buttons; **click any thumbnail to enlarge** in a full-size preview dialog
64	- **Model-aware** — automatically checks if the current model supports vision; non-vision models show a clear warning
65	- Supported: OpenAI GPT-5.2/5.3, Claude (all variants), Gemini
66	
67	### QML/Qt Quick UI (Mono Editorial)
68	
69	The entire front-end was rewritten in **QML/Qt Quick** (`houdini_agent/ui_qml/`), driven by a slim Python `Controller` that streams agent state into a modular QML component library. The design is **Mono Editorial** — a near-black canvas with cream accents and bundled editorial fonts (Fraunces / Newsreader / Space Mono).
70	
71	- Modern Mono Editorial dark theme with a collapsible **library drawer** + chat column layout
72	- Collapsible blocks for thinking process, tool calls, node operations, and results
73	- **Meshy generation cards** — live progress for text/image→3D, retexture, remesh; "run in background" button
74	- **Concept gallery cards** — interactive multi-select galleries for concept-to-3D / text-to-image / image-to-image, with editable prompts, regenerate, second-pass editing, and escalate-to-3D
75	- **Cloud asset library** — a side drawer listing your Meshy generation history with thumbnails; one-click import into Houdini, pagination, and account/balance display
76	- Dedicated **Python Shell** and **System Shell** blocks with syntax highlighting
77	- **Clickable node paths** — paths like `/obj/geo1/box1` in AI responses become links that navigate to the node in Houdini
78	- **Node context bar** showing the currently selected Houdini node (read-only during Plan planning)
79	- **Todo list** displayed above the chat area with live status icons
80	- **Token analytics** — real-time token count, reasoning tokens, cache hit rate, and per-model cost estimates (click for detailed breakdown)
81	- **Streaming VEX code preview** — real-time Cursor Apply-style code writing animation
82	- Multi-session tabs — run multiple independent conversations
83	- Copy button on AI responses; `Ctrl+Enter` to send messages
84	- **Font scaling** — slider popup for live UI zoom; preference persisted
85	- **Bilingual UI** — Chinese/English language switching, with all UI elements and system prompts dynamically retranslated
86	- **Update notification** — banner when a new version is detected, with "Update Now" and dismiss
87	- **Management panel** — in-app Plugin Manager, Rules Editor, and long-term Memory browser
88	- **IME support** — full Chinese/Japanese/Korean input method support on Windows and macOS

129	### 3D Generation (Meshy)
130	
131	Self-contained integration (`houdini_agent/meshy/`) wrapping the [Meshy](https://meshy.ai/) generative-3D API. Network calls run on the app's background thread (never inside Houdini); the resulting GLB + PBR maps are imported into Houdini and wired into a Principled Shader on the main thread. Generation tools consume Meshy credits and are gated by **confirm mode**. Key via `MESHY_API_KEY` (env or `houdini_ai.ini`), or the in-app menu → **Meshy API Key…**.
132	
133	| Tool | Description |
134	| --- | --- |
135	| `meshy_text_to_3d` | Text → textured 3D model (auto preview→refine), downloads GLB + PBR maps to cache; `count` for parallel variants |
136	| `meshy_image_to_3d` | Image (URL / data URI / local path / attached concept image) → textured 3D model |
137	| `meshy_text_to_image` | Text → N 2D concept/reference images in parallel (single `prompt` + `count` or a `prompts` array for distinct directions); pops a gallery (multi-select, editable prompt + regenerate, keep images or escalate selected to 3D) |
138	| `meshy_image_to_image` | **Image-to-image / 2D editing** — reference image(s) + prompt → a new edited image (style swap, background change, variation); auto-uses the user's most recently attached image when none is given; same interactive gallery (regenerate, second-pass edit, escalate to 3D) |
139	| `meshy_concept_to_3d` | Concept-driven, human-in-the-loop: generates N concept images in parallel → gallery card (multi-select + editable prompt + regenerate) → image-to-3d for the chosen concepts (native task chaining) |
140	| `meshy_retexture` | Re-texture an existing model with a PBR set from a text/image prompt — pairs with `export_node_to_glb` to retexture geometry already in the scene |
141	| `meshy_remesh` | Remesh / re-topologize (quad/triangle, target polycount) |
142	| `meshy_balance` | Query remaining Meshy credits (free) |
143	| `meshy_task_status` | Query progress of generations that were **moved to background** (free); no arg lists all, `op` targets one |
144	| `import_3d_asset` | Import a GLB/FBX/OBJ into `/obj` (File SOP) and build + assign a Principled Shader from the PBR maps |
145	| `export_node_to_glb` | Export a scene node's geometry to GLB (feeds `meshy_retexture`) |
146	
147	The value is in the seam: Meshy generates the **seed asset**, Houdini procedurally **amplifies** it (scatter, copy-to-points, fracture, terrain). A live `MeshyCard` shows generation status; results land as an importable asset the agent chains into the scene.
148	
149	**Interactive galleries** — `meshy_text_to_image`, `meshy_image_to_image`, and `meshy_concept_to_3d` pop a `ConceptGalleryCard` with phases `gen → pick → making3d → done`: multi-select the images you like, edit the prompt and regenerate, do a second-pass image-to-image edit on a selection, or escalate the chosen images to 3D — all human-in-the-loop.
150	
151	**Background tasks** — any long Meshy generation can be **moved to the background** ("转入后台"). The agent loop continues while it runs; on completion the result is delivered back as a fresh message, and for galleries an interactive `ConceptGalleryCard` auto-pops (queued until the agent is idle) so you can still pick / edit / escalate. Use `meshy_task_status` to poll explicitly.
152	
153	**Cloud asset library** — a side drawer (`LibraryContent.qml`) aggregates your Meshy generation history (text/image→3D, retexture, remesh) across pages with thumbnails; one click imports any asset into Houdini (downloads GLB + textures → `import_3d_asset`). The header shows account connection status and remaining credit balance.

221	## Skills System
222	
223	Skills are pre-optimized Python scripts that run inside the Houdini environment for reliable geometry analysis. They are preferred over hand-written `execute_python` for common tasks. Skills are automatically registered in the `ToolRegistry` as `skill:xxx` tools. Users can also add custom skills via a **user skill directory** (configurable in settings).
224	
225	| Skill | Description |
226	| --- | --- |
227	| `analyze_geometry_attribs` | Attribute statistics (min/max/mean/std/NaN/Inf) for point/vertex/prim/detail |
228	| `analyze_normals` | Normal quality detection — NaN, zero-length, non-normalized, flipped faces |
229	| `get_bounding_info` | Bounding box, center, size, diagonal, volume, surface area, aspect ratio |
230	| `analyze_connectivity` | Connected components analysis (piece count, point/prim per piece) |
231	| `compare_attributes` | Diff attributes between two nodes (added/removed/type-changed) |
232	| `find_dead_nodes` | Find orphan and unused end-of-chain nodes |
233	| `trace_node_dependencies` | Trace upstream dependencies or downstream impacts |
234	| `find_attribute_references` | Find all nodes referencing a given attribute (VEX code, expressions, string params) |
235	| `analyze_cook_performance` | **New** — Network-wide cook-time ranking, geometry-inflation detection, error/warning nodes, bottleneck identification |

313	        ├── ultra_optimizer.py     # System prompt & tool definition optimizer
314	        ├── updater.py             # Auto-updater (GitHub Releases, ETag caching, notification)
315	        ├── plan_manager.py        # Plan mode data model & persistence
316	        ├── hooks.py               # Plugin hook system (HookManager, PluginContext, PluginLoader)
317	        ├── tool_registry.py       # Unified ToolRegistry — core/skill/plugin/user tools
318	        ├── rules_manager.py       # User Rules manager (UI + file rules, prompt injection)
319	        ├── memory_store.py        # Three-layer memory (episodic/semantic/procedural) with SQLite
320	        ├── embedding.py / reward_engine.py / reflection.py / growth_tracker.py  # Long-term memory system
321	        └── mcp/                   # Houdini MCP layer
322	            ├── client.py          # Tool executor (node ops, shell, skills dispatch, ToolRegistry fallback)
323	            ├── tools/             # Tool handlers (node_ops / param_ops / exec_ops / doc_ops / inspect)
324	            ├── node_inputs.json   # Pre-cached input port info (210+ nodes)
325	            └── server.py / settings.py / logger.py

328	## Quick Start
329	
330	### Requirements
331	
332	- **Houdini 20.5+** (or 21+)
333	- **Windows / macOS / Linux**
334	- **Self-contained runtime** — the standalone app bundles Python and PySide6; no Python install, no pip
335	
336	### Install & launch
337	
338	Houdini Agent is now a **standalone desktop app** that connects to a running Houdini over a **bridge** (it no longer runs inside the Houdini process).
339	
340	1. Download the prebuilt Houdini Agent from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/releases/latest), unzip and run it.
341	2. The app auto-detects local Houdini (20.5+), installs the **bridge package** into Houdini's `packages/` directory, and offers "Open Houdini".
342	3. Houdini auto-starts a **bridge server** on launch; the app connects via its **bridge client** automatically.
343	4. Click **"API Key…"** in-app to save locally, or set an environment variable (below).
344	
345	All `hou.*` calls run on Houdini's main thread over the bridge, keeping things thread-safe.
346	
347	> **Advanced / developers** — you can still run it inside Houdini directly (embedded UI):
348	> 
349	> ```
350	> import sys
351	> sys.path.insert(0, r"C:\path\to\Houdini-Agent")
352	> import launcher
353	> launcher.show_tool()
354	> ```
355	> 
356	> Or build the standalone app yourself with `build_houdini_agent_exe.ps1` (PyInstaller).
357	
358	### Configure API Keys
359	
360	**Option A: Environment Variables (recommended)**
361	
362	```
363	# DeepSeek
364	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY', 'sk-xxx', 'User')
365	
366	# GLM (Zhipu AI)
367	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('GLM_API_KEY', 'xxx.xxx', 'User')
368	
369	# OpenAI
370	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OPENAI_API_KEY', 'sk-xxx', 'User')
371	
372	# Duojie (relay)
373	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('DUOJIE_API_KEY', 'xxx', 'User')
374	```
375	
376	**Option B: In-app settings**
377	
378	Click the "Set API Key…" button and check "Save to local config".

380	## Architecture
381	
382	### Agent Loop Flow
383	
384	```
385	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
386	│  User sends message                                      │
387	│  ↓                                                       │
388	│  System prompt + conversation history + RAG docs         │
389	│  ↓                                                       │
390	│  AI model (streaming) → thinking + tool_calls            │
391	│  ↓                                                       │
392	│  Tool executor dispatches each tool:                     │
393	│    - Houdini tools → main thread (Qt BlockingQueued)     │
394	│    - Shell / web / doc → background thread (non-blocking)│
395	│  ↓                                                       │
396	│  Tool results → fed back to AI as tool messages          │
397	│  ↓                                                       │
398	│  AI continues (may call more tools or produce final text)│
399	│  ↓                                                       │
400	│  Loop until AI finishes or max iterations reached        │
401	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
402	```
403	
404	### QML Front-end Architecture
405	
406	The UI is **QML/Qt Quick** driven by a thin Python layer. The agent loop runs on a background thread; Houdini calls are marshalled back to the Qt main thread.
407	
408	| Component | Module | Responsibility |
409	| --- | --- | --- |
410	| `Controller` | `ui_qml/controller.py` | Central `QObject` exposed to QML — owns UI state, drives the agent loop, streams callbacks as Qt signals (`_sigThink`, `_sigContent`, `_sigToolCall`, `_sigToolResult`, `_sigNodeOp`, `_sigPlan`, `_sigMeshyProgress`, `_sigConcept`, `_sigLibrary`, `_sigShowBgGallery`, …), and orchestrates Meshy galleries, background tasks, and the cloud library |
411	| `ChatModel` | `ui_qml/controller.py` | `QAbstractListModel` of chat rows (user / ai / plan) consumed by `ChatView.qml` |
412	| `AgentSession` | `ui_qml/agent_session.py` | UI-agnostic backend wrapping `AIClient` + `HoudiniMCP`; one `run()` drives `agent_loop_auto()` with caller callbacks (in-Houdini mode) |
413	| `BridgeAgentSession` | `ui_qml/bridge_session.py` | Standalone backend — same interface, but routes `hou.*` tool calls through `BridgeClient` to a running Houdini |
414	| `host.py` / `app.py` / `external_app.py` | `ui_qml/` | QQuickWidget host (registers fonts), in-Houdini launcher, and standalone launcher respectively |
415	
416	QML components live in `ui_qml/qml/HAgent/`; `Theme.qml` centralizes the Mono Editorial palette, fonts, and scale.
417	
418	### Bridge (Standalone ⇄ Houdini)
419	
420	Since v2.0 the app runs **outside** the Houdini process and talks to it over a small localhost socket bridge:
421	
422	- **`bridge/server.py`** — runs inside Houdini (auto-started by the installed bridge package). Receives JSON-lines requests and dispatches `execute_tool` calls onto Houdini's **main thread**, auto-registering the Meshy Houdini handlers (`import_3d_asset`, `export_node_to_glb`).
423	- **`bridge/client.py`** — `BridgeClient` used by the standalone app: `execute_tool(name, args)`, scene context, and undo, all over the bridge port.
424	
425	This keeps all `hou.*` access main-thread-safe while letting the UI live in its own process (so the app can launch, detect, and even start Houdini for you).
426	
427	### Usage Telemetry (anonymous, opt-out)
428	
429	To measure how much Meshy usage flows through Houdini Agent, each **successful** billable Meshy task records an anonymous event (`meshy/telemetry.py`):
430	
431	- **What** — random install id (UUID in `houdini_ai.ini`), timestamp, app version, task kind, task id, AI model, mode, **credits consumed**, and the prompt. No account or personal identity.
432	- **How** — events are written to a local JSONL spool under `cache/meshy/`, then a background thread batches and POSTs them (with exponential backoff) to `https://houdini-agent.com/api/telemetry`. Offline events survive restarts and upload later; dedup is by event id.
433	- **Opt-out** — set `HAGENT_TELEMETRY_OFF=1` or `telemetry_optout` in `houdini_ai.ini`. The backend (`deploy/telemetry_server/`) is pure-stdlib `http.server` + `sqlite3` behind nginx, exposing `POST /api/telemetry` and `GET /api/telemetry/stats`.
434	
435	### Plan Mode
436	
437	Plan mode enables the AI to tackle complex tasks through a structured three-phase workflow:
438	
439	1. **Deep Research** — Read-only scene investigation using query tools
440	2. **Clarify Requirements** — Interactive Q&A with the user via `ask_question` when ambiguity exists
441	3. **Structured Plan** — Generate an engineering-grade execution plan with phases, steps, dependencies, risk assessment, and estimated operations
442	
443	The plan is displayed as an interactive `PlanViewer` card with a DAG flow diagram. The user can review each step's details, approve/reject the plan, and monitor execution progress. Plan data is persisted to `cache/plans/plan_{session_id}.json`.
444	
445	### Brain-inspired Long-term Memory System
446	
447	A five-module system that enables the agent to learn and improve over time:
448	
449	| Module | Description |
450	| --- | --- |
451	| `memory_store.py` | Three-layer SQLite storage — **Episodic** (specific task experiences), **Semantic** (abstracted rules from reflection), **Procedural** (problem-solving strategies with priority) |
452	| `embedding.py` | Local text embedding using `sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2` (384-dim) with fallback to character n-gram pseudo-vectors |
453	| `reward_engine.py` | Dopamine-inspired reward scoring — success, efficiency, novelty, error penalty; drives memory importance strengthening/weakening with time decay |
454	| `reflection.py` | Hybrid reflection — rule-based extraction after every task + periodic LLM deep reflection to generate semantic rules and strategy updates |
455	| `growth_tracker.py` | Rolling-window metrics (error rate, success rate, tool call efficiency) + personality trait formation (efficiency bias, risk tolerance, verbosity, proactivity) |
456	
457	Memory is activated at query time: relevant episodic memories, semantic rules, and procedural strategies are retrieved via cosine similarity and injected into the system prompt.
458	
459	### Plugin System
460	
461	The agent supports external community extensions via a plugin architecture:
462	
463	- **HookManager** (singleton) — manages event registration and dispatch with priority ordering
464	- **PluginLoader** — scans the `plugins/` directory for `.py` files, auto-loads enabled plugins
465	- **PluginContext** — API object passed to each plugin's `register(ctx)` function, providing:
466		- `ctx.on(event, callback)` — register event hooks
467			- `ctx.register_tool(name, description, schema, handler)` — register custom AI-callable tools
468			- `ctx.register_button(icon, tooltip, callback)` — add toolbar buttons
469			- `ctx.insert_chat_card(widget)` — insert custom UI into the chat area
470			- `ctx.get_setting(key)` / `ctx.set_setting(key, value)` — persistent per-plugin settings
471	- **Decorator API** — `@hook`, `@tool`, `@ui_button` decorators for declarative plugin development
472	- **7 hook events**: `on_before_request`, `on_after_response`, `on_before_tool`, `on_after_tool`, `on_content_chunk`, `on_session_start`, `on_session_end`
473	- **Plugin Manager UI** — tabbed dialog (Plugins / Tools / Skills) for enabling/disabling plugins, managing tool visibility, configuring user skill directories, and editing plugin settings
474	
475	Plugins are managed via `config/plugins.json`. See `plugins/PLUGIN_DEV_GUIDE.md` for development documentation.
476	
477	### ToolRegistry
478	
479	A centralized tool management system that unifies three capability sources:
480	
481	| Source | Description |
482	| --- | --- |
483	| **Core** | Built-in Houdini tools (40+), dispatched by MCP Client |
484	| **Skill** | Pre-built analysis scripts, auto-registered as `skill:xxx` |
485	| **Plugin** | Community plugin tools, registered via `PluginContext.register_tool()` |
486	
487	Key features:
488	
489	- **Mode-based access control** — tools are tagged with allowed modes (`agent`, `ask`, `plan_planning`, `plan_executing`); mode guards automatically filter tool availability
490	- **Tag classification** — tools auto-tagged as `readonly`, `geometry`, `network`, `system`, `docs`, `skill`, `task`, `plugin` for fine-grained filtering
491	- **Enable/disable** — individual tools can be toggled on/off via the Plugin Manager UI; state persisted to `config/plugins.json`
492	- **User skill directory** — users can point to a custom directory of skill scripts, which are auto-loaded and registered
493	- **Thread-safe** — all registration/query operations are lock-protected
494	
495	### User Rules (Custom Context)
496	
497	Similar to Cursor Rules, users can define persistent context that is automatically injected into every AI request:
498	
499	- **UI Rules** — created and managed via the Rules Editor dialog; stored in `config/user_rules.json`; individually enable/disable
500	- **File Rules** — `.md` and `.txt` files placed in the `rules/` directory are auto-loaded (files starting with `_` are treated as drafts and excluded)
501	- **Prompt injection** — all enabled rules are merged and wrapped in `<user_rules>` tags, injected into the system prompt
502	- The Rules Editor lives in the in-app management panel (`ManagementPanel.qml`), with a list/editor split layout and empty-state guidance
503	
504	### Context Management
505	
506	- **Native tool message chain**: `assistant(tool_calls)` → `tool(result)` messages are passed directly to the model, preserving structured information
507	- **Strict user/assistant alternation**: Ensures API compatibility across providers
508	- **Round-based trimming**: Conversations are split into rounds (by user messages); when token budget is exceeded, older rounds' tool results are compressed first, then entire rounds are removed
509	- **Never truncate user/assistant**: Only `tool` result content is compressed or removed
510	- **Automatic RAG injection**: Relevant node/VEX/HOM documentation is automatically retrieved based on the user's query
511	- **Duplicate call dedup**: Identical query-tool calls within the same agent turn are deduplicated to save tokens
512	
513	### Thread Safety
514	
515	- Houdini node operations **must** run on the Qt main thread — dispatched via `BlockingQueuedConnection`
516	- Non-Houdini tools (shell, web search, doc lookup) run directly in the **background thread** to keep the UI responsive
517	- All UI updates use Qt signals for thread-safe cross-thread communication
518	- **macOS crash prevention** — removed dangerous `QApplication.processEvents()` from `BlockingQueuedConnection` slots to prevent reentrant crashes; main-thread assertions added for debugging
519	- Tool execution timeout set to 60 seconds to accommodate long-running operations
520	
521	### Token Counting & Cost Estimation
522	
523	- **tiktoken integration** — accurate token counting when available, with improved fallback estimation
524	- **Multimodal token estimation** — images are estimated at ~765 tokens each (low-res mode) for accurate budget tracking
525	- **Per-model pricing** — estimated costs based on each provider's published pricing (input/output/cache rates)
526	- **Reasoning token tracking** — separate count for reasoning/thinking tokens (DeepSeek-R1, GLM-4.7, etc.)
527	- **Multi-provider cache parsing** — unified handling of cache hit/miss metrics across DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Factory/Duojie relay formats
528	- **Token Analytics Panel** — detailed breakdown per request: input, output, reasoning, cache, latency, and cost
529	
530	### Smart Error Recovery
531	
532	- **Parameter hints**: When `set_node_parameter` fails, the error message includes similar parameter names or a list of available parameters to help the AI self-correct
533	- **Doc-check suggestions**: When node creation or parameter setting fails, the error suggests querying documentation (`search_node_types`, `get_houdini_node_doc`, `get_node_parameters`) before retrying blindly
534	- **Connection retry**: Transient network errors (chunk decoding, connection drops) are automatically retried with exponential backoff
535	
536	### Internationalization (i18n)
537	
538	- **Bilingual support** — full Chinese/English interface with `tr()` translation function
539	- **Dynamic switching** — change language from the settings menu; all UI elements, tooltips, and system prompts update instantly
540	- **Persistent preference** — language choice saved via `QSettings` and restored on startup
541	- **System prompt adaptation** — AI reply language enforced via system prompt rules that adapt to the selected UI language
542	
543	### Local Documentation Index
544	
545	The `doc_rag.py` module provides O(1) lookup from bundled ZIP archives:
546	
547	- **nodes.zip** — Node documentation (type, description, parameters) for all SOP/OBJ/DOP/VOP/COP nodes
548	- **vex.zip** — VEX function signatures and descriptions
549	- **hom.zip** — HOM (Houdini Object Model) class and method docs
550	- **Doc/\*.txt** — Knowledge base articles on Houdini programming
551	
552	Relevant docs are automatically injected into the system prompt based on the user's query.
553

556	**Create a scatter setup:**
557	
558	```
559	User: Create a box, scatter 500 points on it, and copy small spheres to the points.
560	Agent: [add_todo: plan 4 steps]
561	       [create_nodes_batch: box → scatter → sphere → copytopoints]
562	       [set_node_parameter: scatter npts=500, sphere radius=0.05]
563	       [connect_nodes: ...]

602	## Troubleshooting
603	
604	### API Connection Issues
605	
606	- Use the "Test Connection" button to diagnose
607	- Check that your API key is correct
608	- Verify network access to the API endpoint
609	
610	### Agent Not Calling Tools
611	
612	- Ensure the selected provider supports Function Calling
613	- DeepSeek, GLM-4.7, OpenAI, Duojie (Claude) and OpenRouter all support tool calling
614	- A custom endpoint must point at a model with tool-calling support
615	
616	### Node Operations Fail
617	
618	- Confirm you are running inside Houdini (not standalone Python)
619	- Check that node paths are absolute (e.g. `/obj/geo1/box1`)
620	- Review the tool execution result for specific error messages
621	
622	### UI Freezing
623	
624	- Non-Houdini tools (shell, web) should run in the background thread
625	- If the UI freezes during shell commands, update to the latest version
626	
627	### Updating
628	
629	- Click the **Update** button in the toolbar to check for new versions
630	- The plugin checks GitHub on startup (silently) and shows an **update notification banner** above the input area if a new version is available
631	- One-click "Update Now" from the banner or toolbar button
632	- Updates preserve your `config/`, `cache/`, `trainData/`, `plugins/`, and `rules/` directories
633	- After updating, the plugin restarts automatically

671	- **v1.0.3** — **Agent / Ask mode**: Radio-style toggle below the input area — Agent mode has full tool access; Ask mode restricts to read-only/query tools with a whitelist guard and system prompt constraint. **Undo All / Keep All**: Batch operations bar tracks all pending node/param changes; "Undo All" reverts in reverse order, "Keep All" confirms everything at once. **Deep thinking framework**: `<think>` tag now requires a structured 6-step process (Understand → Status → Options → Decision → Plan → Risk) with explicit thinking principles. **Auto-updater**: `VERSION` file for semver tracking; silent GitHub API check on startup; one-click download + apply + restart with a progress dialog; preserves `config/`, `cache/`, `trainData/` during update. **`tools_override`**: `agent_loop_stream` and `agent_loop_json_mode` accept custom tool lists for mode-specific filtering. ParamDiff defaults to expanded. Skip undo snapshot when parameter value is unchanged.
672	- **v1.0.2** — **Parameter Diff UI**: `set_node_parameter` now shows inline red/green diff for scalar changes and collapsible unified diff for multi-line VEX code, with one-click undo to restore old values (supports scalars, tuples, and expressions). **User message collapse**: messages longer than 2 lines auto-fold with "expand / collapse" toggle. **Scene-aware RAG**: auto-retrieval query enriched with selected node types from Houdini scene; dynamic `max_chars` (400/800/1200) based on conversation length. **Persistent HTTP Session**: `requests.Session` with connection pooling eliminates TLS renegotiation per turn. **Pre-compiled regex**: XML tag cleanup patterns compiled once at class level. **Sanitize dirty flag**: skip O(n) message sanitization when no new tool messages are added. **Removed inter-tool delays** (`time.sleep` eliminated between Houdini tool executions).

11	## Houdini Agent
12	
13	**[English](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/blob/main/README.md)** | **[中文](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/blob/main/README_CN.md)**
14	
15	独立运行的 SideFX Houdini AI 智能助手，支持自主多轮工具调用、 **Meshy AI 3D 生成** （文/图生 3D、概念图画廊、图生图/二次编辑、重打材质、重拓扑）、 **云资产库** 、联网搜索、VEX/Python 代码执行、Plan 模式规划复杂任务、大脑启发式长期记忆系统、插件 Hook 系统支持社区扩展、用户自定义上下文规则，配备现代 **QML/Qt Quick** 桌面 UI 与双语支持。
16	
17	从 **v2.0** 起，Houdini Agent 以 **独立桌面程序** 形式运行，通过轻量 **Bridge** 连接正在运行的 Houdini（不再嵌入 Houdini 进程内），前端完全用 **QML/Qt Quick** 重写（Mono Editorial 设计风格）。
18	
19	基于 **OpenAI Function Calling** 协议，Agent 可以读取节点网络、创建/修改/连接节点、编写 VEX Wrangle、用 Meshy 生成并导入 3D 资产、执行系统命令、联网搜索、查询本地文档、创建结构化执行计划、从历史交互中持续学习、通过插件扩展能力 —— 全部在自主循环中迭代完成。统一的 **ToolRegistry** 集中管理核心工具、技能脚本和插件工具，支持基于模式的访问控制。
20	
21	## 核心特性
22	
23	### Agent 循环
24	
25	AI 以自主 **Agent 循环** 运行：接收用户请求 → 规划步骤 → 调用工具 → 检查结果 → 继续调用 → 直到任务完成。提供三种模式：
26	
27	- **Agent 模式** — 完整权限，AI 可以使用全部 50+ 工具，创建、修改、连接、删除节点，设置参数，执行脚本，生成并导入 3D 资产，保存场景。
28	- **Ask 模式** — 只读模式，AI 只能查询场景结构、检查参数、搜索文档和提供分析。所有修改类工具被 `ToolRegistry` 模式守卫拦截。
29	- **Plan 模式** — AI 进入规划阶段：只读调研当前场景，通过 `ask_question` 澄清需求，然后生成带 DAG 流程图的结构化执行计划。用户审核确认后方可执行。内置 **自动续接机制** ，检测 AI 过早终止并强制继续执行直到所有步骤完成。
30	
31	```
32	用户请求 → AI 规划 → 调用工具 → 检查结果 → 调用更多工具 → … → 最终回复
33	```
34	
35	- **多轮工具调用** — AI 自主决定调用哪些工具、以什么顺序执行
36	- **Todo 任务系统** — 复杂任务自动拆分为子任务，实时跟踪状态
37	- **流式输出** — 实时显示思考过程和回复内容
38	- **深度思考** — 原生支持推理模型（DeepSeek-R1、GLM-4.7、Claude `<think>` 标签）
39	- **随时中断** — 可在任意时刻停止正在运行的 Agent 循环
40	- **智能上下文管理** — 按轮次裁剪对话，永不截断用户/助手消息，仅压缩工具结果
41	- **长期记忆** — 大脑启发式三层记忆系统（事件记忆、抽象知识、策略记忆），基于奖励驱动的学习与自动反思
42	- **插件系统** — 通过 `plugins/` 目录支持外部社区扩展，包含 Hook 事件、自定义工具、UI 按钮和设置
43	- **用户规则** — 类似 Cursor Rules 的持久上下文规则，自动注入到每次 AI 请求中
44	
45	### 支持的 AI 提供商
46	
47	| 提供商 | 模型 | 说明 |
48	| --- | --- | --- |
49	| **DeepSeek** | `deepseek-v4-flash` 、 `deepseek-v4-pro` 、 `deepseek-chat` *、 `deepseek-reasoner`* | V4：显式 thinking 参数 + reasoning\_effort；\*旧模型 2026/07/24 废弃 |
50	| **智谱 GLM** | `glm-4.7` | 国内访问稳定，原生推理与工具调用 |
51	| **OpenAI** | `gpt-5.2` 、 `gpt-5.3-codex` | 能力强大，完整 Function Calling 与 Vision 支持 |
52	| **拼好饭** （中转） | `claude-opus-4-6-gemini` 、 `claude-opus-4-6-max` 、 `claude-sonnet-4-5` 、 `claude-sonnet-4-6` 、 `gemini-3-flash` 、 `gemini-3.1-pro` 、 `glm-5-turbo` 、 `glm-5.1` 、 `MiniMax-M2.7` 、 `MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed` | 通过中转接口使用 Claude、Gemini、GLM、MiniMax |
53	| **OpenRouter** | `claude-sonnet-4.6` 、 `claude-opus-4.6` 、 `gpt-5.2` 、 `gemini-2.5-pro` 、 `deepseek-r1` 、 `grok-4.1-fast` 、 `llama-4-maverick` 、 `qwen3-235b` 等 16 个 | 通过单一 API Key 使用所有主流提供商的模型 |
54	| **自定义** | 用户可配置 | 任何 OpenAI 兼容端点（LM Studio、vLLM 等）；可配置 URL、API Key、模型名、上下文限制、Vision 和 FC 支持 |
55	
56	### 图片/多模态输入
57	
58	- **多模态消息** — 为支持视觉的模型附加图片（PNG/JPG/GIF/WebP）
59	- **粘贴与拖拽** — `Ctrl+V` 从剪贴板粘贴图片，或直接拖拽图片文件到输入框
60	- **文件选择器** — 点击「Img」按钮从磁盘选择图片
61	- **图片预览** — 发送前在输入框上方显示缩略图，支持单独移除； **点击缩略图可放大查看** （弹出全尺寸预览窗口）
62	- **模型感知** — 自动检测当前模型是否支持视觉；不支持的模型会给出明确提示
63	- 已支持：OpenAI GPT-5.2/5.3、Claude（所有变体）、Gemini
64	
65	### QML/Qt Quick 界面（Mono Editorial）
66	
67	整个前端用 **QML/Qt Quick** 重写（ `houdini_agent/ui_qml/` ），由一个精简的 Python `Controller` 把 Agent 状态以信号流式推送给模块化的 QML 组件库。设计风格为 **Mono Editorial** —— 近黑画布配米色点缀，内置编辑设计字体（Fraunces / Newsreader / Space Mono）。
68	
69	- 现代 Mono Editorial 深色主题，左侧可折叠 **资产库抽屉** + 右侧对话栏布局
70	- 思考过程、工具调用、节点操作、执行结果均可折叠/展开
71	- **Meshy 生成卡片** — 文/图生 3D、重打材质、重拓扑的实时进度；带「转入后台」按钮
72	- **概念图画廊卡片** — 概念图转 3D / 文生图 / 图生图的交互式多选画廊，支持改提示词、重新生成、二次编辑、把选中的升级成 3D

127	### 3D 生成（Meshy）
128	
129	自包含集成（ `houdini_agent/meshy/` ），封装 [Meshy](https://meshy.ai/) 生成式 3D API。网络调用跑在 App 后台线程（绝不进 Houdini）；得到的 GLB + PBR 贴图在主线程导入 Houdini 并自动接成 Principled Shader。生成类工具消耗 Meshy credits，受 **执行前确认** 门控。密钥用 `MESHY_API_KEY` （环境变量或 `houdini_ai.ini` ），或应用内菜单 → **Meshy API Key…** 。
130	
131	| 工具 | 描述 |
132	| --- | --- |
133	| `meshy_text_to_3d` | 文字 → 带贴图 3D 模型（自动 preview→refine），下载 GLB + PBR 贴图到缓存； `count` 可并行出多个变体 |
134	| `meshy_image_to_3d` | 图片（URL / data URI / 本地路径 / 对话附图）→ 带贴图 3D 模型 |
135	| `meshy_text_to_image` | 文字 → 并行生成 N 张 2D 概念图/参考图（ `prompt` + `count` 出同词变体，或 `prompts` 数组出不同方向）；弹画廊（多选、改提示词重生、只保留图片或把选中的升级成 3D） |
136	| `meshy_image_to_image` | **图生图 / 2D 二次编辑** — 参考图 + 提示词 → 新图片（换风格、换背景、出变体）；用户附了图时自动取最近一张作参考；同样弹交互画廊（重生、二次编辑、升级成 3D） |
137	| `meshy_concept_to_3d` | 概念图驱动、人在环：并行生成 N 张概念图 → 画廊卡片（多选 + 可改提示词 + 重新生成）→ 对选中的图分别做 image-to-3d（原生任务串接） |
138	| `meshy_retexture` | 给已有模型重打 PBR 材质（文字/图片提示）— 配合 `export_node_to_glb` 可给场景里已有几何重打材质 |
139	| `meshy_remesh` | 重拓扑 / 改面数（quad/triangle，目标面数） |
140	| `meshy_balance` | 查询 Meshy 剩余 credits（免费） |
141	| `meshy_task_status` | 查询【转入后台】运行中的生成任务进度（免费）；不带参数列全部， `op` 指定某个任务 |
142	| `import_3d_asset` | 把 GLB/FBX/OBJ 导入 `/obj` （File SOP），并用 PBR 贴图搭建并指派 Principled Shader |
143	| `export_node_to_glb` | 把场景节点几何导出成 GLB（喂给 `meshy_retexture` ） |
144	
145	价值在接缝处：Meshy 生成 **种子资产** ，Houdini 程序化 **放大** 它（scatter、copy-to-points、碎裂、地形）。生成过程有实时 `MeshyCard` 进度卡片；结果落地为可导入资产，由 agent 串进场景。
146	
147	**交互式画廊** —— `meshy_text_to_image` 、 `meshy_image_to_image` 、 `meshy_concept_to_3d` 会弹出 `ConceptGalleryCard` ，分 `生成 → 挑选 → 转 3D → 完成` 几个阶段：多选你满意的图、改提示词重新生成、对选中的图做二次图生图编辑，或把选中的升级成 3D —— 全程人在环。
148	
149	**后台任务** —— 任何耗时的 Meshy 生成都可以 **转入后台** 运行。Agent 循环不被阻塞继续往下走；完成后结果作为一条新消息自动送回，画廊类任务会自动弹出可交互的 `ConceptGalleryCard` （若 Agent 仍在运行则排队到空闲时弹出），仍可挑选/编辑/升级。也可用 `meshy_task_status` 主动查询进度。
150	
151	**云资产库** —— 侧滑抽屉（ `LibraryContent.qml` ）按页聚合你在 Meshy 的历史生成（文/图生 3D、重打材质、重拓扑）并带缩略图；一键即可把任意资产导入 Houdini（下载 GLB + 贴图 → `import_3d_asset` ）。抽屉顶部显示账号连接状态与剩余额度。

219	## Skill 系统
220	
221	Skill 是预优化的 Python 脚本，在 Houdini 环境中运行，用于可靠的几何体分析。涉及几何分析时优先使用 Skill，而非手写 `execute_python` 。所有 Skill 自动注册到 `ToolRegistry` 中，工具名以 `skill:xxx` 格式命名。用户还可以通过设置 **用户技能目录** 加载自定义 Skill。
222	
223	| Skill | 说明 |
224	| --- | --- |
225	| `analyze_geometry_attribs` | 属性统计（min/max/mean/std/NaN/Inf），支持 point/vertex/prim/detail |
226	| `analyze_normals` | 法线质量检测 — NaN、零向量、未归一化、翻转面 |
227	| `get_bounding_info` | 边界盒信息：中心、尺寸、对角线、体积、表面积、长宽比 |
228	| `analyze_connectivity` | 连通性分析（独立部分数量、每部分的点数/面数） |
229	| `compare_attributes` | 两个节点的属性差异对比（新增/缺失/类型变化） |
230	| `find_dead_nodes` | 查找孤立节点和未使用的链末端节点 |
231	| `trace_node_dependencies` | 追溯上游依赖树或下游影响范围 |
232	| `find_attribute_references` | 查找网络中所有引用指定属性的节点（VEX 代码、表达式、字符串参数） |
233	| `analyze_cook_performance` | **新增** — 全网络 cook 时间排名、几何体膨胀点检测、错误/警告节点、瓶颈识别 |

314	        ├── hooks.py               # 插件 Hook 系统（HookManager、PluginContext、PluginLoader）
315	        ├── tool_registry.py       # 统一工具注册中心 — 核心/技能/插件/用户工具
316	        ├── rules_manager.py       # 用户规则管理器（UI + 文件规则，Prompt 注入）
317	        ├── memory_store.py        # 三层记忆存储（事件/抽象/策略）SQLite
318	        ├── embedding.py / reward_engine.py / reflection.py / growth_tracker.py  # 长期记忆系统
319	        └── mcp/                   # Houdini MCP 层
320	            ├── client.py          # 工具执行器（节点操作、Shell、Skill 分发、ToolRegistry 降级分发）
321	            ├── tools/             # 工具 handler（node_ops / param_ops / exec_ops / doc_ops / inspect）
322	            ├── node_inputs.json   # 预缓存的输入端口信息（210+ 节点）
323	            └── server.py / settings.py / logger.py
324	```
325	
326	## 快速开始
327	
328	### 环境要求
329	
330	- **Houdini 20.5+** （或 21+）
331	- **Windows / macOS / Linux**
332	- **自带运行环境** — 独立程序内置 Python 与 PySide6，无需安装 Python，也无需 pip
333	
334	### 安装与启动
335	
336	Houdini Agent 现在是 **独立桌面程序** ，通过 **Bridge** 连接正在运行的 Houdini（不再在 Houdini 进程内运行）。
337	
338	1. 从 [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent/releases/latest) 下载预构建的「Houdini Agent」，解压后双击运行。
339	2. 程序自动探测本机 Houdini（20.5+）并将 **桥接 package** 安装到 Houdini 的 `packages/` 目录，然后提示「打开 Houdini」。
340	3. Houdini 启动时会自动拉起 **bridge server** ；外置程序通过 **bridge client** 自动连接。
341	4. 在程序内点「 **API Key…** 」保存到本机，或设置环境变量（见下）。
342	
343	所有 `hou.*` 调用都经 Bridge 在 Houdini 主线程执行，保证线程安全。
344	
345	> **进阶 / 开发者** — 也可在 Houdini 内直接运行（自动跑内嵌界面）：
346	> 
347	> ```
348	> import sys
349	> sys.path.insert(0, r"C:\path\to\Houdini-Agent")
350	> import launcher
351	> launcher.show_tool()
352	> ```
353	> 
354	> 或用 `build_houdini_agent_exe.ps1` 自行构建独立程序（PyInstaller）。
355	
356	### 配置 API Key
357	
358	**方式一：环境变量（推荐）**
359	
360	```
361	# DeepSeek
362	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('DEEPSEEK_API_KEY', 'sk-xxx', 'User')
363	
364	# 智谱 GLM
365	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('GLM_API_KEY', 'xxx.xxx', 'User')
366	
367	# OpenAI
368	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OPENAI_API_KEY', 'sk-xxx', 'User')
369	
370	# 拼好饭（中转）
371	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('DUOJIE_API_KEY', 'xxx', 'User')
372	
373	# OpenRouter
374	[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OPENROUTER_API_KEY', 'sk-or-xxx', 'User')
375	```

377	**方式二：工具内设置**

380	
381	## 架构
382	
383	### Agent 循环流程
384	
385	```
386	┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
387	│  用户发送消息                                           │
388	│  ↓                                                     │
389	│  系统提示词 + 对话历史 + RAG 文档                        │
390	│  ↓                                                     │
391	│  AI 模型（流式）→ 思考过程 + tool_calls                  │
392	│  ↓                                                     │
393	│  工具执行器分发每个工具调用：                              │
394	│    - Houdini 工具 → 主线程（Qt BlockingQueued）          │
395	│    - Shell / 联网 / 文档 → 后台线程（非阻塞）             │
396	│  ↓                                                     │
397	│  工具结果 → 以 tool 消息反馈给 AI                        │
398	│  ↓                                                     │
399	│  AI 继续（可能调用更多工具或生成最终回复）                  │
400	│  ↓                                                     │
401	│  循环直到 AI 完成或达到最大迭代次数                        │
402	└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
403	```
404	
405	### QML 前端架构
406	
407	界面是 **QML/Qt Quick** ，由一层很薄的 Python 驱动。Agent 循环跑在后台线程；Houdini 调用统一编组回 Qt 主线程执行。
408	
409	| 组件 | 模块 | 职责 |
410	| --- | --- | --- |
411	| `Controller` | `ui_qml/controller.py` | 暴露给 QML 的核心 `QObject` — 持有 UI 状态、驱动 Agent 循环、把回调以 Qt 信号流式推送（ `_sigThink` 、 `_sigContent` 、 `_sigToolCall` 、 `_sigToolResult` 、 `_sigNodeOp` 、 `_sigPlan` 、 `_sigMeshyProgress` 、 `_sigConcept` 、 `_sigLibrary` 、 `_sigShowBgGallery` 等），并编排 Meshy 画廊、后台任务和云资产库 |
412	| `ChatModel` | `ui_qml/controller.py` | `QAbstractListModel` ，承载对话行（user / ai / plan），供 `ChatView.qml` 消费 |
413	| `AgentSession` | `ui_qml/agent_session.py` | UI 无关的后端，封装 `AIClient` + `HoudiniMCP` ；一个 `run()` 用调用方回调驱动 `agent_loop_auto()` （Houdini 内嵌模式） |
414	| `BridgeAgentSession` | `ui_qml/bridge_session.py` | 独立模式后端 — 接口相同，但把 `hou.*` 工具调用经 `BridgeClient` 路由到正在运行的 Houdini |
415	| `host.py` / `app.py` / `external_app.py` | `ui_qml/` | 分别是 QQuickWidget 宿主（注册字体）、Houdini 内启动器、独立启动器 |
416	
417	QML 组件位于 `ui_qml/qml/HAgent/` ； `Theme.qml` 集中管理 Mono Editorial 调色板、字体和缩放。
418	
419	### Bridge（独立程序 ⇄ Houdini）
420	
421	从 v2.0 起程序运行在 Houdini **进程之外** ，通过一个小型 localhost 套接字桥与之通信：
422	
423	- **`bridge/server.py`** — 跑在 Houdini 内（由安装的 bridge package 自动拉起）。接收 JSON-lines 请求，把 `execute_tool` 调用分发到 Houdini **主线程** ，并自动注册 Meshy 的 Houdini handler（ `import_3d_asset` 、 `export_node_to_glb` ）。
424	- **`bridge/client.py`** — 独立程序使用的 `BridgeClient` ： `execute_tool(name, args)` 、场景上下文、撤销，全部走 bridge 端口。
425	
426	这样既保证所有 `hou.*` 访问都在主线程安全执行，又让 UI 跑在自己的进程里（程序可以自行启动、探测、甚至帮你拉起 Houdini）。
427	
428	### 用量埋点（匿名、可关闭）
429	
430	为统计有多少 Meshy 用量是通过 Houdini Agent 产生的，每个 **成功** 的计费类 Meshy 任务会记录一条匿名事件（ `meshy/telemetry.py` ）：
431	
432	- **记什么** — 随机安装 id（存在 `houdini_ai.ini` 的 UUID）、时间戳、程序版本、任务类型、任务 id、AI 模型、模式、 **消耗的 credits** 、以及提示词。不含账号或个人身份。
433	- **怎么传** — 事件先写到 `cache/meshy/` 下的本地 JSONL 暂存，再由后台线程分批 POST（指数退避重试）到 `https://houdini-agent.com/api/telemetry` 。离线事件跨重启保留、稍后补传；按事件 id 去重。
434	- **关闭** — 设置 `HAGENT_TELEMETRY_OFF=1` ，或在 `houdini_ai.ini` 里置 `telemetry_optout` 。后端（ `deploy/telemetry_server/` ）是纯标准库 `http.server` + `sqlite3` ，挂在 nginx 后，提供 `POST /api/telemetry` 和 `GET /api/telemetry/stats` 。
435	
436	### Plan 模式
437	
438	Plan 模式使 AI 能够通过结构化的三阶段工作流处理复杂任务：
439	
440	1. **深度调研** — 使用只读查询工具调查当前场景
441	2. **需求澄清** — 发现歧义时通过 `ask_question` 与用户交互确认
442	3. **结构化规划** — 生成工程级执行计划，包含阶段划分、步骤、依赖关系、风险评估和预估操作量
443	
444	计划以交互式 `PlanViewer` 卡片显示，附带 DAG 流程图。用户可以查看每个步骤的详情、批准/拒绝计划，并监控执行进度。计划数据持久化到 `cache/plans/plan_{session_id}.json` 。
445	
446	### 大脑启发式长期记忆系统
447	
448	五个模块组成的系统，使 Agent 能够持续学习和改进：
449	
450	| 模块 | 说明 |
451	| --- | --- |
452	| `memory_store.py` | 三层 SQLite 存储 — **事件记忆** （具体任务经历）、 **抽象知识** （反思生成的经验规则）、 **策略记忆** （解决问题的套路，带优先级） |
453	| `embedding.py` | 本地文本向量化，使用 `sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2` （384维），回退方案为字符 n-gram 伪向量 |
454	| `reward_engine.py` | 类多巴胺奖励评分 — 成功度、效率、新颖度、错误惩罚；驱动记忆重要度的强化/衰减，附带时间衰减 |
455	| `reflection.py` | 混合反思 — 每次任务后规则提取 + 定期 LLM 深度反思生成抽象规则和策略更新 |
456	| `growth_tracker.py` | 滚动窗口指标（错误率、成功率、工具调用效率趋势）+ 个性特征形成（效率偏好、风险容忍度、回复详细度、主动性） |
457	
458	查询时自动激活记忆：通过余弦相似度检索相关的事件记忆、抽象规则和策略记忆，注入到系统提示词中。
459	
460	### 插件系统
461	
462	Agent 通过插件架构支持外部社区扩展：
463	
464	- **HookManager** （单例）— 管理所有 Hook 注册和事件分发，支持优先级排序
465	- **PluginLoader** — 扫描 `plugins/` 目录下的 `.py` 文件，自动加载已启用的插件
466	- **PluginContext** — 传给每个插件 `register(ctx)` 函数的 API 对象，提供：
467		- `ctx.on(event, callback)` — 注册事件钩子
468			- `ctx.register_tool(name, description, schema, handler)` — 注册自定义 AI 可调用工具
469			- `ctx.register_button(icon, tooltip, callback)` — 添加工具栏按钮
470			- `ctx.insert_chat_card(widget)` — 在聊天区域插入自定义 UI
471			- `ctx.get_setting(key)` / `ctx.set_setting(key, value)` — 持久化插件设置
472	- **装饰器 API** — `@hook` 、 `@tool` 、 `@ui_button` 装饰器，支持声明式插件开发
473	- **7 个 Hook 事件** ： `on_before_request` 、 `on_after_response` 、 `on_before_tool` 、 `on_after_tool` 、 `on_content_chunk` 、 `on_session_start` 、 `on_session_end`
474	- **插件管理器 UI** — 三标签页对话框（插件/工具/技能），支持启用/禁用插件、管理工具可见性、配置用户技能目录、编辑插件设置
475	
476	插件配置存储在 `config/plugins.json` 。详细开发文档见 `plugins/PLUGIN_DEV_GUIDE.md` 。
477	
478	### ToolRegistry（统一工具注册中心）
479	
480	集中管理三套能力系统的统一工具管理器：
481	
482	| 来源 | 说明 |
483	| --- | --- |
484	| **Core（核心）** | 内置 Houdini 工具（40+），由 MCP Client 分发执行 |
485	| **Skill（技能）** | 预构建分析脚本，自动注册为 `skill:xxx` |
486	| **Plugin（插件）** | 社区插件工具，通过 `PluginContext.register_tool()` 注册 |
487	
488	核心功能：
489	
490	- **基于模式的访问控制** — 工具标记允许的模式（ `agent` / `ask` / `plan_planning` / `plan_executing` ），模式守卫自动过滤工具可用性
491	- **标签分类** — 工具自动标记为 `readonly` / `geometry` / `network` / `system` / `docs` / `skill` / `task` / `plugin` 等，支持细粒度过滤
492	- **启用/禁用** — 单个工具可通过插件管理器 UI 开关切换，状态持久化到 `config/plugins.json`
493	- **用户技能目录** — 用户可指定自定义目录加载 Skill 脚本，自动注册到注册中心
494	- **线程安全** — 所有注册/查询操作加锁保护
495	
496	### 用户规则（自定义上下文）
497	
498	类似 Cursor Rules 的功能，用户可以定义持久上下文，自动注入到每次 AI 请求中：
499	
500	- **UI 规则** — 通过规则编辑器对话框创建和管理，存储在 `config/user_rules.json` ，可单独启用/禁用
501	- **文件规则** — 将 `.md` 和 `.txt` 文件放在 `rules/` 目录下即自动加载（以 `_` 开头的文件视为草稿，不加载）
502	- **Prompt 注入** — 所有启用的规则合并后用 `<user_rules>` 标签包裹注入系统提示词
503	- 规则编辑器位于应用内管理面板（ `ManagementPanel.qml` ），带列表/编辑器分栏布局和空状态引导
504	
505	### 上下文管理
506	
507	- **原生工具消息链** ： `assistant(tool_calls)` → `tool(result)` 消息直接传递给模型，保留结构化信息
508	- **严格的 user/assistant 交替** ：确保跨提供商的 API 兼容性
509	- **按轮次裁剪** ：对话按用户消息分割为轮次；超出 Token 预算时，先压缩旧轮次的工具结果，再整轮删除最早的轮次
510	- **永不截断 user/assistant** ：仅压缩或移除 `tool` 结果内容
511	- **自动 RAG 注入** ：根据用户查询自动检索相关的节点/VEX/HOM 文档
512	- **重复调用去重** ：同一轮 Agent 循环中，相同参数的查询类工具调用会自动去重，节省 Token
513	
514	### 线程安全
515	
516	- Houdini 节点操作 **必须** 在 Qt 主线程运行 — 通过 `BlockingQueuedConnection` 分发
517	- 非 Houdini 工具（Shell、联网搜索、文档查询）在 **后台线程** 直接运行，保持 UI 响应
518	- 所有 UI 更新通过 Qt 信号实现线程安全的跨线程通信
519	- **macOS 崩溃防护** — 移除 `BlockingQueuedConnection` 槽函数中的 `QApplication.processEvents()` 调用，防止重入导致崩溃；新增主线程断言用于调试
520	- 工具执行超时设置为 60 秒，以适应长时间运行的操作
521	
522	### Token 计数与费用估算
523	
524	- **tiktoken 集成** — 可用时使用 tiktoken 精准计数，否则使用改良估算
525	- **多模态 Token 估算** — 图片按约 765 Token 估算（低分辨率模式），确保预算跟踪准确
526	- **按模型计费** — 根据各提供商公布的定价（输入/输出/缓存费率）估算费用
527	- **推理 Token 追踪** — 单独统计推理/思考 Token（DeepSeek-R1、GLM-4.7 等）
528	- **多提供商缓存解析** — 统一处理 DeepSeek、OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Factory/拼好饭中转的 Cache 命中/未命中指标
529	- **Token 分析面板** — 每次请求的详细分解：输入、输出、推理、缓存、延迟和费用
530	
531	### 智能错误恢复
532	
533	- **参数纠错提示** ： `set_node_parameter` 失败时，错误信息会列出相似的参数名或全部可用参数，帮助 AI 自我纠正
534	- **文档查阅建议** ：节点创建或参数设置失败时，建议先查询文档（ `search_node_types` 、 `get_houdini_node_doc` 、 `get_node_parameters` ）再重试
535	- **连接重试** ：网络瞬态错误（分块解码失败、连接中断等）自动指数退避重试
536	
537	### 国际化（i18n）
538	
539	- **双语支持** — 完整的中英文界面， `tr()` 翻译函数
540	- **动态切换** — 在设置菜单中切换语言；所有 UI 元素、工具提示和系统提示词即时更新
541	- **持久化偏好** — 语言选择通过 `QSettings` 保存，启动时自动恢复
542	- **系统提示词适配** — AI 回复语言通过系统提示词规则强制，随 UI 语言自动调整
543	
544	### 本地文档索引
545	
546	`doc_rag.py` 模块提供基于 ZIP 归档的 O(1) 查找：
547	
548	- **nodes.zip** — 全部 SOP/OBJ/DOP/VOP/COP 节点的文档（类型、描述、参数）
549	- **vex.zip** — VEX 函数签名和说明
550	- **hom.zip** — HOM（Houdini Object Model）类和方法文档
551	- **Doc/\*.txt** — Houdini 编程知识库文章
552	
553	相关文档会根据用户的查询自动注入到系统提示词中。
554	
555	## 使用示例
556	
557	**创建散点流程：**
558	
559	```
560	用户：创建一个 box，在上面 scatter 500 个点，然后把小球复制到这些点上。
561	Agent：[add_todo: 规划 4 个步骤]
562	       [create_nodes_batch: box → scatter → sphere → copytopoints]
563	       [set_node_parameter: scatter npts=500, sphere radius=0.05]
564	       [connect_nodes: ...]
565	       [verify_and_summarize]
566	完成。创建了 box1 → scatter1 → copytopoints1，球体模板半径 0.05，500 个点。
567	```
568	
569	**分析几何属性：**
570	
571	```
572	用户：/obj/geo1/OUT 有哪些属性？
573	Agent：[run_skill: analyze_geometry_attribs, node_path=/obj/geo1/OUT]
574	该节点有 5 个 point 属性：P(vector3)、N(vector3)、Cd(vector3)、pscale(float)、id(int)。...
575	```
576	
577	**搜索文档并应用：**
578	
579	```
580	用户：heightfield noise 节点怎么用？
581	Agent：[search_local_doc: heightfield noise]
582	       [get_houdini_node_doc: heightfield_noise]
583	       [web_search: "SideFX Houdini heightfield noise parameters"]
584	根据文档，heightfield_noise 需要 HeightField 作为输入。...
585	```
586	
587	**执行系统命令：**
588	
589	```
590	用户：给 Houdini 的 Python 安装 numpy。
591	Agent：[execute_shell: "C:/Program Files/Side Effects Software/Houdini 21.0/bin/hython.exe" -m pip install numpy]
592	成功安装 numpy-1.26.4。
593	```

595	**编写 VEX 代码：**
596	
597	```
598	用户：给所有点添加随机颜色。
599	Agent：[create_wrangle_node: vex_code="@Cd = set(rand(@ptnum), rand(@ptnum*13.37), rand(@ptnum*7.13));"]
600	已创建 attribwrangle1，为所有点设置了随机 Cd 属性。
601	```

603	## 常见问题
604	
605	### API 连接问题
606	
607	- 使用「测试连接」按钮进行诊断
608	- 检查 API Key 是否正确
609	- 确认网络可以访问 API 端点
610	
611	### Agent 不调用工具

## Project Overview (from the documentation)

**Houdini Agent** is a standalone AI assistant for SideFX Houdini, currently at **v2.0.1**. It is an open-source project hosted at `https://github.com/Kazama-Suichiku/Houdini-Agent`.

### Key characteristics:

- **Standalone desktop app** (since v2.0) that connects to a running Houdini instance over a lightweight localhost socket **bridge** (no longer embedded in Houdini's process).
- **QML/Qt Quick front-end** with "Mono Editorial" design (near-black canvas, cream accents, editorial fonts: Fraunces / Newsreader / Space Mono).
- Built on the **OpenAI Function Calling** protocol -- the agent operates in an autonomous loop: receive request, plan steps, call tools, inspect results, iterate.
- **50+ tools** for node operations, queries, visualization, Meshy 3D generation, code execution, web search, documentation lookup, skills, NetworkBox management, layout, performance profiling, task management, long-term memory, and Plan mode.
- **Multiple AI providers**: DeepSeek, GLM (Zhipu AI), OpenAI, Duojie (relay), OpenRouter, and custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
- **Meshy AI 3D generation** integration (text/image-to-3D, concept galleries, image-to-image editing, retexture, remesh, cloud asset library).
- **Brain-inspired long-term memory system**: episodic, semantic, and procedural layers with reward-driven learning and automatic reflection.
- **Plugin system** with hook events, custom tools, UI buttons, and settings via `plugins/` directory.
- **Three operating modes**: Agent (full access), Ask (read-only), Plan (structured planning with DAG flow diagrams and auto-resume).
